mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION (NOTI_ID, MEMBER_ID, NOTI_TYPE, REFERENCE_ID, CONTENT, IS_READ, CREATED_AT) VALUES (NOTIFICATION_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{member_id}, #{noti_type}, #{reference_id}, #{content}, 'N', SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_READ = 'N' ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTIFICATION SET IS_READ = 'Y' WHERE NOTI_ID = #{notiId}
